The '''Royal Gardens''' of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] were located within the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Royal Palace]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

==History==
The Royal Gardens of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] were located between the towers of the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Royal Palace]]. A lush courtyard of [[Color/Legends|colorful]] flora from across the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], the gardens contained many [[Flower/Legends|flowers]] and [[Tree/Legends|trees]] such as the [[Rominaria flower]]. An artificial waterfall mimicked the natural ones that crested over the cliffs of Theed just outside the Palace walls; several fountains and benches dotted the expansive garden, as well as a gazebo. Like many other portions of the palace, the gardens were for the exclusive enjoyment of the [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|monarch's]] court or guests of the crown.<ref name="ASD" />
